  1. uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.bad

Uses of Package
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.bad

Packages that use uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.bad
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.bad
Provides the domain model for tools that were requested by the model but could not be found.
  • Classes in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.bad used by uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.bad
    Class
    Description
    BadTool
    A special tool implementation representing a tool that was requested by the model but was not found in the registered toolkits.
    BadToolCall
    Represents a call to a BadTool, capturing an invalid tool request from the model.
    BadToolParam
    A placeholder parameter for a BadTool.
    BadToolResponse
    The response for a BadToolCall.
